name: LibreTranslate
description: Free and Open Source machine translation API
compose:
name: slashnode-libretranslate
services:
  main:
    image: libretranslate/libretranslate:v1.6.5
    container_name: libretranslate
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      LT_API_KEYS: 'true'
      LT_API_KEYS_DB_PATH: /app/db/api_keys.db
      LT_UPDATE_MODELS: 'true'
    volumes:
      - main_data-api_keys:/app/db
      - main_data-models:/home/libretranslate/.local:rw
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:7017:5000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  main_data-api_keys:
    name: slashnode-libretranslate_main_data-api_keys
  main_data-models:
    name: slashnode-libretranslate_main_data-models
